title: Branchpoint Map Builder
purpose: Record major V1700 branchpoints and prepare inheritance authority before Page09~Page17 development.

core_invariants: future work resumes from repository artifacts and metadata rather than memory-only chat state
successor_requirements: future roadmap stages must keep manifest and release metadata authority
forbidden_regressions: declare stage completion without repository artifact or metadata evidence

core_invariants: legacy systems are selectively restored or mapped rather than silently discarded
successor_requirements: future replacement must explain what is inherited, replaced, or deprecated
forbidden_regressions: delete old logic without successor trace

core_invariants: native narrative physics remains an ancestor of later literary-state logic
successor_requirements: future evaluation and rendering pages must preserve narrative-state continuity
forbidden_regressions: replace narrative physics with prompt-only generation without lineage mapping

core_invariants: branchpoint survival must be checked before studio progression
adversarial broken-proof evidence must not be skipped
successor_requirements: future writer-studio pages must not bypass adversarial validation lineage
forbidden_regressions: remove adversarial negative corpus requirement without successor trace

core_invariants: Gate25/28/29 governance and cross-lineage release authority must survive
successor_requirements: future gates must declare relationship to inherited gate governor authority
forbidden_regressions: introduce new gate that bypasses inherited gate governor lineage

core_invariants: MultiWork, GIG, formula registry, and learning plans require gated activation
successor_requirements: future activation requires isolation, advisory-first graph intelligence, and audit-first learning
forbidden_regressions: activate MultiWork sharing before project isolation
activate learning before audit and rollback

core_invariants: Provider-Zero remains default
Node2 remains surface-safe
raw reveal access remains blocked unless successor policy explicitly changes it
successor_requirements: all future pages inherit Provider-Zero default and Node2 surface safety
forbidden_regressions: allow provider calls without sandbox policy
allow Node2 raw reveal access

core_invariants: memory remains contract-first, read-first, local-first, and surface-projected
successor_requirements: Story Repository and Codex work must not bypass memory boundary discipline
forbidden_regressions: enable memory write without explicit write contract
replace memory body with unbounded live RAG without successor trace

core_invariants: execution remains deterministic and dry-run safe until approved mutation path exists
successor_requirements: Narrative Agent execution must inherit deterministic evidence and dry-run discipline
forbidden_regressions: execute agent mutation without sandbox and approval

core_invariants: rendering body remains surface-draft and boundary-aware until approved successors exist
successor_requirements: Draft Candidate and IDE surfaces must distinguish candidate rendering from committed manuscript
forbidden_regressions: treat rendered candidate as committed manuscript without approval

core_invariants: evaluation outputs must preserve advisory vs blocking separation where applicable
successor_requirements: Page12 must not promote literary advisory values into hard gates without evidence and policy
forbidden_regressions: hard-block literary outcome solely from 8D value

core_invariants: governance body controls authority, override, default-deny, and boundary inheritance
successor_requirements: future override or approval workflows must declare governance inheritance
forbidden_regressions: introduce approval path without governance authority trace

core_invariants: evolution body controls absorption, deprecation, migration, compatibility, and release seal authority
successor_requirements: Page08~Page17 roadmap must inherit evolution body absorption and deprecation discipline
forbidden_regressions: absorb commercial feature without deprecation and successor policy

core_invariants: 8D literary values remain advisory
8D evidence integrity is gated
successor_requirements: Page12 may add EAT8D feature extraction but must preserve advisory status unless a later promotion record exists
forbidden_regressions: mark Stage185 as hub-official without hub closure evidence
use 8D value as hard literary quality gate

core_invariants: 13 logical phases are organized into 10 design pages
Page08 must precede Page09 commercial absorption
successor_requirements: Stage186 must begin with branchpoint and connectivity mapping
forbidden_regressions: start Page09 before Page08 authority closure

core_invariants: Codex-style Narrative Agent concepts are remapped into Page10~Page13 rather than direct Stage186~195 reuse
successor_requirements: Page09 must encode Codex-first policy after Page08 closes
forbidden_regressions: reuse uploaded Stage186~195 numbering as active roadmap numbering
